title: Mathematical Formalisms
description: Public companion code and verification suites for mathematical-physics papers by Jared D. Dunahay (AEO Trivector LLC). The first paper in this monorepo establishes a canonical noncommutative deformation of the 8-torus indexed by the Clifford algebra Cl(3,0), with closed-form spectrum, Pfaffian, Frobenius decomposition, a Pythagorean spectral identity, and a Lambert-W localization. The repository is structured to admit additional papers under self-contained subdirectories, each with its own theorem/code/test traceability map and deterministic reproduction script.
